mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_resource WHERE md5_code = #{md5Code} AND deleted = 0

SELECT kr.resource_id, kr.title, kr.file_type, kc.category_name, kr.upload_user_name, kr.view_count, kr.download_count, DATE_FORMAT(kr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS create_time FROM knowledge_resource kr LEFT JOIN knowledge_category kc ON kr.category_id = kc.category_id WHERE kr.deleted = 0 AND kr.status = '1' ORDER BY kr.view_count DESC, kr.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kr.resource_id, kr.title, kr.file_type, kc.category_name, kr.upload_user_name, kr.view_count, kr.download_count, DATE_FORMAT(kr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS create_time FROM knowledge_resource kr LEFT JOIN knowledge_category kc ON kr.category_id = kc.category_id WHERE kr.deleted = 0 AND kr.status = '1' ORDER BY kr.download_count DESC, kr.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kr.resource_id, kr.title, kr.file_type, kc.category_name, kr.upload_user_name, kr.view_count, kr.download_count, kr.file_size, DATE_FORMAT(kr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS create_time, MAX(kdl.download_time) AS last_access_time, DATEDIFF(NOW(), COALESCE(MAX(kdl.download_time), NOW())) AS days_without_access FROM knowledge_resource kr LEFT JOIN knowledge_category kc ON kr.category_id = kc.category_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_download_log kdl ON kr.resource_id = kdl.resource_id WHERE kr.deleted = 0 AND kr.status = '1' GROUP BY kr.resource_id, kr.title, kr.file_type, kc.category_name, kr.upload_user_name, kr.view_count, kr.download_count, kr.file_size, kr.create_time HAVING MAX(kdl.download_time) IS NULL OR MAX(kdl.download_time) < #{thresholdTime} ORDER BY days_without_access DESC, kr.create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
